name: Demo User
comment: The filters make it easy to find spicy, vegetarian, vegan, and halal menu options without guessing.

name: Demo User
comment: The authenticity explanation is more useful than a generic star rating because it explains the family-owned panadería background.

name: Demo User
comment: The cuisine-fidelity score clearly separates a specialist ramen shop from a general Asian restaurant.

name: Demo User
comment: Helpful for finding local Mediterranean food with vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-conscious menu choices.

name: Demo User
comment: The site explains why Burger King can score highly for being authentic American fast food while still scoring low for local ownership.
